channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - wccftech.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for wccftech.com

item.title: Rockstar May Be Reluctant to Share Grand Theft Auto VI Details, But Brazilian Retailer Spills Detailed Gameplay Feature List
item.content:encoded:
Rockstar Games may have opened pre-orders for Grand Theft Auto VI, but they haven't released a third trailer yet, and they also didn't share many details about the game itself, leaving fans wanting.

Thankfully, Brazilian retailer Kabum has posted the most detailed overview we've got to date about the most anticipated game ever made, and the features sound really juicy. Here's a quick lowdown (though we've also included the entirety of the translated description below for those who must absolutely know everything):

  • Grand Theft Auto VI has the biggest and most dense map ever made by Rockstar
  • Switching control between Jason and Lucia happens in real time, which helps execute "highly coordinated heists". Moreover, each protagonist has different abilities that influence the missions
  • NPCs are powered by advanced AI and generate random events across Leonida, and side missions can be discovered by browsing social media through the characters' cell phones
  • From the technical standpoint, Rockstar has implemented advanced ray tracing global illumination, a dynamic weather system that affects physics and gameplay, and PS5 Pro optimization delivering better performance, a more stable frame rate, and higher resolution

Grand Theft Auto VI redefines the concept of open-world (sandbox) gameplay. Explore the most massive, dense, and insane map ever created by Rockstar Games. Traverse the neon-lit streets of a pulsating Vice City, dominate dangerous swamps, crowded beaches, and realistic suburbs that cover the state of Leonida from end to end. Every inch of the environment has been designed to deliver brutal immersion and total freedom.

The main campaign features a unique dynamic with the franchise's first criminal couple. Switch control between Jason and Lucia in real time, dictating the story's pace and executing highly coordinated heists. Experience the evolution of character management, where each protagonist possesses unique abilities that directly influence the criminal ecosystem and the tactical intelligence of the missions.

The universe of GTA VI pulsates in a hyper-realistic way. The NPCs (non-player characters) have their own routines based on advanced AI, generating organic random events across the map. The great innovation lies in the in-game integration of social networks: your character's cell phone consumes viral videos in real time, allowing you to follow Vice City influencers and discover secret side missions through social media.

Developed natively to extract maximum power from Sony's hardware, GTA VI delivers breathtaking visuals. The updated graphics engine features:

  • Global Illumination with Advanced Ray Tracing: Perfect reflections on cars and water in Vice City.
  • Realistic Dynamic Weather: Storms and time changes that alter physics and gameplay.
  • Optimization for PS5 Pro: Enjoy enhanced performance, more stable frame rates (FPS), and even sharper resolutions on the most powerful console on the market.

Of course, these details remain unconfirmed at the time being. Still, which of these features would you find to be most exciting and why? Share a comment below with your thoughts.

About the author: With over two decades of experience in gaming journalism, Alessio Palumbo has led the gaming vertical at Wccftech since August 2015. He started working at a young age for Italian websites like Everyeye.it, Gamestar.it, Nextgame.it, and Multiplayer.it before kickstarting the indie English-language publication Worlds Factory as its founder and Editor in Chief. In the last decade, he has coordinated the overall output of Wccftech's gaming section, managed PR relations, assigned reviews, produced daily news coverage, edited gaming content as needed, and delivered game reviews. Arguably, his trademark content is the long series of exclusive developer interviews that have been cited by Wikipedia and by the biggest news media and gaming publications. His passion for technology also makes him knowledgeable when it comes to gaming hardware and tech. His favorite genres include RPGs, MMORPGs, and action/adventure games.

Follow Wccftech on Google to get more of our news coverage in your feeds.



https://wccftech.com/gta-vi-gameplay-features-brazilian-retailer-leak/
